nasb.text: ‘Then at the beginning of each of your months you shall present a burnt offering to the Lord: two bulls and one ram, seven male lambs one year old without defect;

esv.text: “At the beginnings of your months, you shall offer a burnt offering to the Lord: two bulls from the herd, one ram, seven male lambs a year old without blemish;

cnv.text: “‘每月第一日，你們要把燔祭獻給耶和華，就是兩頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、七隻沒有殘疾一歲的公羊羔。

ccb.text: “在朔日，要给耶和华献燔祭——两头公牛犊、一只公绵羊和七只一岁的公羊羔，都要毫无残疾。
